text:
{
  "scenes": [
    {
      "title": "Abandoned For Decades",
      "scene": 1,
      "start": 0.06,
      "end": 2.38,
      "prompt": "Bold white sans-serif text 'ABANDONED FOR DECADES' centered on a dark emerald abstract watercolor background of tangled vines and moss, high contrast, clean typography",
      "image_to_video": "Subtle slow zoom-in with faint particle drift, 1.5s",
      "type_of_scene": "text"
    },
    {
      "title": "Refused To Die",
      "scene": 2,
      "start": 2.54,
      "end": 4.29,
      "prompt": "Distorted, blurry, abstract rendering of a lone, resilient flower pushing through cracked concrete, dramatic backlighting, dark and moody color palette with a single vibrant bloom, impressionistic style with visible brushstrokes",
      "image_to_video": "Slow push in towards the flower's struggle, with subtle shimmering light effects, 1.5s",
      "type_of_scene": "video"
    },
    {
      "title": "Roses Climbed Gate",
      "scene": 3,
      "start": 4.88,
      "end": 6.85,
      "prompt": "Close-up of ancient, ornate wrought-iron gate, completely enveloped by thick growth of thorny rose vines, deep crimson roses in bloom, soft diffused sunlight, painterly style, shallow depth of field",
      "image_to_video": "A subtle, organic sway of the rose vines in a gentle breeze, 1.5s",
      "type_of_scene": "video"
    },
    {
      "title": "Thorns Locked Shut",
      "scene": 4,
      "start": 6.96,
      "end": 9.16,
      "prompt": "Extreme close-up of intertwining thorny rose stems, appearing to form a natural lock around a rusted metal bar, bokeh background of dark foliage, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, deep focus on the thorns, expressive brushwork",
      "image_to_video": "Very slow, almost imperceptible zoom in, with a slight textural shimmer, 1.5s",
      "type_of_scene": "image"
    },
    {
      "title": "Ivy Covered Walls",
      "scene": 5,
      "start": 9.24,
      "end": 12.22,
      "prompt": "Textured wide shot of an old stone wall completely covered in dense, dark green ivy, creating a 'second skin' effect, dappled sunlight filtering through, rich earthy tones, realistic but with an atmospheric, slightly surreal feel",
      "image_to_video": "Slow left-to-right pan across the ivy-covered wall, revealing its texture, 2s",
      "type_of_scene": "video"
    },
    {
      "title": "Crooked Apple Tree",
      "scene": 6,
      "start": 12.22,
      "end": 18.06,
      "prompt": "Centered shot of a single, ancient, gnarled apple tree growing crookedly in the overgrown ruins of a fountain, twisted branches reaching skyward, vivid green leaves, scattered red apples, dramatic golden hour lighting, impressionistic, slightly melancholic mood",
      "image_to_video": "Static shot with very subtle rustling of leaves in a faint breeze, 3s",
      "type_of_scene": "video"
    },
    {
      "title": "Heavy With Fruit",
      "scene": 7,
      "start": 18.24,
      "end": 21.01,
      "prompt": "Close-up of a branch laden with ripe, red-and-green apples, with a few falling apples blurred in the foreground, against a soft-focus background of dark foliage, soft, warm light, slightly melancholic and abundant feel, oil painting style",
      "image_to_video": "A single apple slowly detaching and falling towards the bottom of the frame, 1.5s",
      "type_of_scene": "video"
    },
    {
      "title": "Birds Came Went",
      "scene": 8,
      "start": 21.7,
      "end": 23.1,
      "prompt": "Silhouettes of several birds taking flight from the branches of the apple tree, against a softly fading sunset sky, minimalist composition, warm and cool color contrast, ethereal, slightly blurred effect",
      "image_to_video": "Birds moving gracefully from the tree and flying off-screen, 1s",
      "type_of_scene": "video"
    },
    {
      "title": "Seasons Turned",
      "scene": 9,
      "start": 23.4,
      "end": 24.02,
      "prompt": "Bold white sans-serif text 'SEASONS TURNED' centered on an abstract background blending colors of all four seasons (spring green, summer gold, autumn red, winter blue-grey), impressionistic watercolor texture",
      "image_to_video": "Subtle, smooth morphing of the background colors creating a fluid motion, 1s",
      "type_of_scene": "text"
    },
    {
      "title": "Its Own Time",
      "scene": 10,
      "start": 24.76,
      "end": 26.89,
      "prompt": "Wide shot, from a slightly elevated perspective, looking down into the wild, unkempt garden, light mist rising, ancient stone paths barely visible, sense of quiet dignity and timelessness, dark but serene color palette, mystical, dreamlike quality",
      "image_to_video": "Slow, contemplative pull-back, revealing more of the garden's vastness, 2s",
      "type_of_scene": "video"
    },
    {
      "title": "Answering To No One",
      "scene": 11,
      "start": 27.14,
      "end": 27.86,
      "prompt": "Bold white sans-serif text 'ANSWERING TO NO ONE' centered on a deep, dark forest green abstract background, with subtle, almost invisible, swirling patterns hinting at ancient energy, clean typography",
      "image_to_video": "A very gentle, almost imperceptible circular motion of the background texture, 0.8s",
      "type_of_scene": "text"
    }
  ]
}
